text:
Apply for WIC Today | Contra Costa Health
Thank you for taking the time to contact the Contra Costa WIC Program. A WIC representative may contact you by email or phone during regular business hours Mon-Fri to follow up with your message.
If you are interested in applying to the WIC program, please fill out the application below.
If you are a WIC participant changing an appointment, please call your local WIC office to reschedule your appointment. For specific WIC site hours of service, see our
Locations and Hours
.
